description_long: This is a rustic log cabin constructed primarily from interlocking wooden logs, featuring a steeply pitched gable roof with prominent crossed beams at the apex. The front facade displays a small, centered wooden door flanked by two decorative lanterns and small, lattice-patterned windows. The roof is composed of overlapping wooden planks, giving it a rugged, hand-built appearance, and extends over the main structure and a smaller side extension. The cabin sits on a raised wooden base with vertical slats, and the logs are reinforced at the corners with vertical posts. The rear and side views reveal additional small windows with lattice grilles and the absence of any rear or side doors. The overall design evokes traditional Scandinavian or Northern European log cabins, emphasizing durability and simplicity.
description: A rustic log cabin with a steep gable roof, crossed beams, and decorative lattice windows, built from interlocking wooden logs and raised on a wooden base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance door, two small lattice windows, decorative lanterns, and the prominent crossed roof beams.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the steep, overlapping wooden plank roof and the extension on one side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain log wall, crossed beams, and absence of windows or doors.
description_view_3: Side view with two small lattice windows and the log construction visible, no doors present.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roof with crossed ridge beams and overlapping wooden planks
attribute_window_arrangement: Two small, square lattice windows symmetrically placed on the front facade, and two similar windows on one side; all windows are small and evenly spaced, with decorative grilles.
attribute_door_placement: Single wooden door centered on the front facade, flanked by windows and lanterns; no other exterior doors visible.
